name: testflight_crashes
description: Fetch TestFlight crash data. Without crashId, lists recent crashes. With crashId, returns the full crash log with stack trace.

bundleId.description: The bundle ID of the app (e.g., com.example.myapp)

crashId.description: Specific crash ID to fetch full details for. If omitted, lists recent crashes.

limit.description: Maximum number of crashes to list (default: 20, max: 100, ignored when crashId is provided)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response, to fetch the next page
